reviews.review_msg: Derek is the best. His lectures are engaging, clear, and enjoyable. Time goes by fast because you're actually following and thinking, not just trying to survive the material. He uses examples that make things click instead of just repeating formulas. He's fair with grades. The course ended up being directly useful for my research. Recommend 100%!

Derek is the best professor at SFU. First time I've actually been excited to come to class and learn. His explanations were the best and he even held extra office hours a couple of times before each exam. Very nice, funny guy and he deserves all the recognition in the world. Outstanding guy. I recommend.

Derek is an amazing professor. It's amazing how he genuinely cares about every student and does not have any any bias towards specific students unlike many other professors at SFU. He did take a while to grade everything but I would say he is fair to his students. Great lectures as well!

Derek is a great statistics professor. His lectures are entertaining and he provides a lot of real-life examples. I struggled a lot during the semester, but he helped me a lot outside of class during the office hours and replying to my emails.
Prof Wang is super caring and helpful. The class is relatively light and easy for someone with a statistics background. If you ever get stuck, she will always help you during her office hours.
